---
title: "config.yml"
toc: false
page-layout: full
number-sections: false
---

[← Back to workflow](../../mh1-processor.html)

Runtime configuration — GCS buckets, NASA endpoints, publish targets.

::: {.code-shell}

```{.yaml}
{{< include ../../workflows/mh1-mpoc-mpic-processor/config/config.yml >}}
```

:::
